_disclaimer: SYNTHETIC SAMPLE — fabricated numbers for output-format illustration only. DEMO is not a real token.
single_points_of_failure: Validator set bootstrapped via single foundation multisig at genesis; rotation procedure exists but has not been exercised on mainnet
Cross-chain bridge to Ethereum depends on third-party message-passing protocol with 13-of-19 guardian threshold
centralization_risks: Top-5 validators control 41% of active stake (Nakamoto coefficient = 8)
Protocol-level upgrade gated by 7-of-12 council signatures with no on-chain timelock
rationale: DEMO has accumulated 6 independent audits across core protocol contracts (3 from tier-1 firms, 3 from mid-tier), with zero high-severity findings unaddressed. One minor incident in Q3 2024 caused a 12-hour chain halt due to a deterministic finality bug; user funds were not affected and a hot-fix shipped within 36 hours. Bug bounty program is active at $500K maximum payout via Immunefi. The two material residual risks are the un-exercised validator rotation procedure and the bridge dependency; both are common to this L1 cohort and don't disqualify the tier-4 rating, but they prevent a tier-5 'battle-tested' assessment. Recommend monitoring any cross-chain bridge incidents and watching for the first live validator rotation event.
